appsync.datasource.ApiId.Description: Unique AWS AppSync GraphQL API identifier where this data source will be created.

appsync.datasource.Description.Description: The description of the data source.

appsync.datasource.DynamoDBConfig.Description: AWS Region and TableName for an Amazon DynamoDB table in your account.

appsync.datasource.ElasticsearchConfig.Description: AWS Region and Endpoints for an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain in your account.  As of September 2021, Amazon Elasticsearch Service is Amazon OpenSearch Service. This property is deprecated. For new data sources, use *OpenSearchServiceConfig* to specify an OpenSearch Service data source.

appsync.datasource.HttpConfig.Description: Endpoints for an HTTP data source.

appsync.datasource.LambdaConfig.Description: An ARN of a Lambda function in valid ARN format. This can be the ARN of a Lambda function that exists in the current account or in another account.

appsync.datasource.Name.Description: Friendly name for you to identify your AppSync data source after creation.

appsync.datasource.OpenSearchServiceConf.Description: AWS Region and Endpoints for an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain in your account.

appsync.datasource.RelationalDatabaseCon.Description: Relational Database configuration of the relational database data source.

appsync.datasource.ServiceRoleArn.Description: The AWS Identity and Access Management service role ARN for the data source. The system assumes this role when accessing the data source.  Required if `Type` is specified as `AWS_LAMBDA`, `AMAZON_DYNAMODB`, `AMAZON_ELASTICSEARCH`, or `AMAZON_OPENSEARCH_SERVICE`.

appsync.datasource.Type.Description: The type of the data source.  +  **AWS_LAMBDA**: The data source is an AWS Lambda function.+  **AMAZON_DYNAMODB**: The data source is an Amazon DynamoDB table.+  **AMAZON_ELASTICSEARCH**: The data source is an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain.+  **AMAZON_OPENSEARCH_SERVICE**: The data source is an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain.+  **NONE**: There is no data source. This type is used when you wish to invoke a GraphQL operation without connecting to a data source, such as performing data transformation with resolvers or triggering a subscription to be invoked from a mutation.+  **HTTP**: The data source is an HTTP endpoint.+  **RELATIONAL_DATABASE**: The data source is a relational database.
appsync.datasource.Type.Type` <a name=\"cfn-appsync-datasource-:
The data source is an AWS Lambda function\.
+  **AMAZON\_DYNAMODB*
